title: Direct Routing and Bounded Worker Pools · Mastery Check
summary: A release board compares near-miss Go and RabbitMQ decisions for direct routing and bounded worker pools and accepts only bounded ownership, causal evidence, and an explicit live-broker transfer gate. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a capacity-aware Go work distribution service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain the default exchange queue-name binding and choose it only when direct queue-name coupling is intentional; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Design direct exchange bindings that keep producer intent stable while consumer queues evolve; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Use one queue with multiple consumers for load distribution and state that each delivery goes to one active consumer at a time; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Default Exchange Coupling · changed case · Quiz Default Exchange Coupling
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Go messaging team handles case 6117 during outbox relay recovery after a database commit. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence; bound payload, queue, confirm-ledger, and handler bytes; then exhaust retry age before attempts reach their maximum. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Explain the default exchange queue-name binding and choose it only when direct queue-name coupling is intentional; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Which action demonstrates Default Exchange Coupling without dropping earlier contracts?

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Worker Effect Evidence
steps.instruction:

Build deterministic Go evidence to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then raise a broker resource alarm and halt new admission. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Worker Effect Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Worker Effect Evidence, keep Worker Effect Evidence connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Worker Effect Evidence, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Worker Effect Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Worker Effect Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A quiz Go messaging team handles case 7163 during consumer shutdown drill with one blocked handler goroutine. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then raise a broker resource alarm and halt new admission. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

For RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Worker Effect Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A worker should acknowledge before starting slow work to prevent duplicates. In Go, one goroutine per delivery is not a capacity or fairness policy.
